context_history.content: I want to learn about: html. DO NOT greet me. Immediately start lesson Step 1 by explaining the core concept on the whiteboard.
HTML, or HyperText Markup Language, is the foundational building block of the web. It provides the structural skeleton of a website, defining where content like text, links, and images are placed.

visual_content.detail: HTML, Structure, Content, HTML defines the structure which then holds the content.
